description_long: This is a large, rectangular-bladed cleaver with a dark, slightly weathered metal blade that shows a reddish discoloration along the lower edge, suggestive of staining or wear. The blade is broad and flat, with a straight cutting edge and squared-off tip, typical of butcher or kitchen cleavers. The handle is robust, black, and ergonomically contoured, appearing to be made of a synthetic or composite material for a secure grip. The transition between the blade and handle is smooth, with no visible guard or bolster. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with no decorative elements, and the object looks heavy-duty, suitable for chopping or cleaving tasks. The finish is matte to semi-gloss, with the blade showing some surface texture and the handle being smoother.
description: A large, rectangular-bladed cleaver with a dark, stained metal blade and a black, contoured handle. The design is utilitarian and robust, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full rectangular blade with reddish discoloration and the black ergonomic handle.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the rounded, dark handle and the thin blade profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view of the cleaver, again showing the broad blade and handle, with similar discoloration visible.
description_view_3: Edge-on view displaying the thinness of the blade and the handle's width.
attribute_handle_design: contoured, black synthetic handle with smooth finish
